member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.IPUPExtensions
member.summary: Pup test method extension.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.IPUPExtensions.GetAdHocConfigSets
member.summary: Get adHoc config set database to be added to PupService.
member.returns: A list of IPupConfig set to be added to Pup Service database.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.IPUPExtensions.GetModelData
member.summary: Get lists of plists targeted by the model.
member.returns: A list of plists objects targeted by the model and per model version.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.State
member.summary: Indicates enabled or disabled state of the feature.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.State.Enabled
member.summary: Feature is enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.State.Disabled
member.summary: Feature is disabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MatchMode
member.summary: Match mode - mode for matching and resolving PUP execution modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MatchMode.VidOnly
member.summary: Match by VID only.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MatchMode.EfuseOnly
member.summary: Match by eFuse only.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MatchMode.VidAndEfuseBoth
member.summary: Match by both Vid and eFuse - both must be defined.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MatchMode.EfuseAndVidOptional
member.summary: Match by VID and Efuse , but VID is optional.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.PupDebugMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the debug mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.MonitorLoopNum
member.summary: Gets or sets the Monitor Loop Num.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.PatternsFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path of the patterns file. Setting its type as String instead of a File because it can have @LATEST_REV@ token in the path , which makes the file path not valid until resolved.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.TargetedPlistsFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path of the targeted plists file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.EFuseUserFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the current EFuse user format.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.PupMatchMode
member.summary: Gets or sets desired PUP match mode which defined how the per unit nodes in PUP.json will be matched.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.ConvertUnitMatchMode
member.summary: Convert TM param to Pup enum.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PUP.PrimePUPTestMethod.ResolvePupFile
member.summary: Resolve Pup file path logic.
